prose:
**Ethylene frontier-orbital energies and HOMO-LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz`; this was a single-point calculation on the provided geometry. SCF converged in 6 cycles.

HOMO energy = -7.6155818 eV
LUMO energy = -0.17986527 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV

The calculation logged live to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpfp2lw_qi/live.json`.
